strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and engineering depth
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest — key required stack components
No clear evidence of Kotlin or Java backend service experience despite listed proficiency
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent exposure, and a track record of building scalable, test-driven systems — all highly aligned with the role. While he lacks direct Nest.js and Vitest experience, his mastery of equivalent technologies (Node.js, Jest, React) suggests quick adaptability. The German language limitation is minor given the English-dominant tech environment, and his open-source work signals strong engineering culture fit.
